name: Bennet Outreach Team
subject: the naysayers are at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Hey Team,

Sorry to email you again, did you see Michael's message? It's attached below, but we wanted to reiterate - [you've made this campaign's success possible.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The talking heads, pundits, and Twitter warriors said Michael would never qualify for the debates. [Your support made it possible.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

The naysayers are at it again - they're itching to see our fundraising numbers and write us off after the FEC deadline on Sunday.

[**Will you rush a donation to prove them all wrong again?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
* * *
**_Original message from Michael_**

Team,

I'll be upfront: [I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, but first let me tell you why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This week is crucial to our campaign. Come Thursday, I'll be on stage at the first Democratic debate and then three days later we're facing our first FEC deadline.

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our campaign has made enormous progress.

Many people considered our campaign a long shot, and they said I had almost no chance of being in the debate. [But with your support, we proved them all wrong.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

After Sunday, our fundraising numbers will be made public and the doubters are chomping at the bit to "prove" that this campaign won't survive.

I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, so every step I take in this journey is because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Today, I 'm counting on your support. We can't afford to fall short now that we've come so far. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters again ahead of these crucial deadlines? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Right now, I'm preparing for the first Democratic debate on Thursday. I will have the chance to share my vision for building opportunity for every American and restoring integrity to our government.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

[I need to know you're standing with me on Thursday night.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba225/134673f2/1193e22/6996a8be/4125406921/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team, your support is crucial ahead of these deadlines. Thanks for your continuing support. It means so much to me.

Michael

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Jared Kushner visits Middle East with ‘opportunity of the century’ peace vision
body:
Generations of Palestinians have lived without ever knowing peace. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cebb003d68&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **Jared Kushner visits Middle East with ‘opportunity of the century’ peace vision**

**Generations of Palestinians** have lived without ever knowing peace. The West Bank has fallen into a state of prolonged crisis. And throughout much of Gaza, families must subsist with barely [a few hours of working electricity](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=abc8dce124&e=3ee4985eea) each day.

**The Palestinian story** will not end here, however. Although failed by a long line of violent “leaders” who seek perpetual war and terror over peace and prosperity, most Palestinian people want to build a real future for both themselves and their children.

**🎬****Jared Kushner:** [“We want to see peace, security, and prosperity.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=baa75751d3&e=3ee4985eea)

**A few hours ago,** White House senior advisor Jared Kushner addressed world business leaders alongside key Middle East officials in Manama, Bahrain. He laid out a remarkable “opportunity of the century” economic plan, which would constitute the most ambitious and comprehensive international effort for Palestinians to date.

**“The conventional wisdom** about the fate of the Palestinians is remarkably consistent,” Kushner said. “In meeting after meeting, and conference after conference, I hear the same broken record of negativity about why progress is not possible.”

**Yet “while politicians pay lip service** , the world moves forward, and the Palestinian people continue to be left behind,” he added.

**_Peace to Prosperity_** is President Donald J. Trump’s political and economic vision for a vibrant, free Middle East. Today, Kushner laid out the economic half of that plan. The goal is to allow the Palestinian and Israeli people an opportunity to see what a prosperous Middle East looks like before discussing a political roadmap to peace.

**The economic plan** rests on addressing three crucial pillars of Palestinian society: the economy, the people, and the government:
* **Unleash economic potential** by providing investors with confidence that their assets will be secure with improved property rights, rule of law, fiscal sustainability, capital markets, and anti-corruption policies

* **Empower the Palestinian people** through education, workforce development, and an improved quality of life

* **Enhance Palestinian Governance** by encouraging the Palestinian public sector to provide the services and administration necessary for a better future

**“My direct message** to the Palestinian people, is that despite what those who have let you down in the past say, President Trump and America have not given up on you," Kushner said.

[See President Trump’s economic vision for the Palestinian people.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06dec02ea3&e=3ee4985eea)

**Jon Lerner in CNN** : [“Trump’s Middle East plan is a refreshing change”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=131881e101&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Medal of Honor goes to first living Iraq War veteran**

**In a historic moment today,** President Trump presented the Medal of Honor to U.S. Army Staff Sergeant David Bellavia at the White House. Bellavia became the first living veteran of the War in Iraq to receive America’s highest military recognition.

**🎬****President Trump:**[ “David, today we honor your extraordinary courage.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4491e1423e&e=3ee4985eea)

**In November 2004,** then-Staff Sgt. Bellavia was serving as a squad leader in support of Operation Phantom Fury in Fallujah, Iraq. He was clearing a block of houses when his platoon became pinned down. Without hesitation, Bellavia leaped into harm’s way—entering the house where his squad was trapped, providing cover so his fellow soldiers could escape, and then reentering the home to kill the insurgents who attacked his troops.

**That remarkable day** , then-Staff Sgt. Bellavia rescued an entire squad, cleared an insurgent strongpoint, and saved members of his platoon from imminent threat.

**“David exemplifies** the same warrior ethos that gave his grandfather, and all of the heroes of Normandy, the strength to defeat evil exactly 75 years ago,” the President said.

[Watch President Trump present the Medal of Honor to Staff Sgt. Bellavia.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3debdbd09e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **President Donald J. Trump is joined in prayer by Medal of Honor recipient U.S. Army Staff Sgt. David Bellavia in the East Room** | June 25, 2019
---
|

---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: One of the most important parts of our campaign
body:

you. I wouldn’t be reaching
out if it wasn’t urgent, but:

Will you donate to our campaign before our big FEC filing deadline and
chip away at our million-dollar goal? Whatever you can give at this moment
will make a difference.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

Your contribution isn’t just an investment in our campaign for president
-- it’s an investment in a fierce movement that demands change; in a fight
to restore opportunity, justice, truth, decency, and equality back into
our country; in a strong future for all of us and generations to come.

And since our campaign made the deliberate choice to reject contributions
from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists, your donation is an investment
that puts power back in the hands of the people.

My team is looking for me to be focused on the debates for the next two
days, but I knew I could count on you to help us reach our goal, so I’m
directly reaching out during this crucial time.

Please consider adding a donation to
our campaign for president. Every dollar from this movement counts, no

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Chip in $5 now [ ]Chip in $25 now [ ]Chip in $50 now [ ]Chip in $100 now [ ]Chip in $250 now [ ]Another Amount Thanks for all you do to make our campaign stronger. For The People, — Kamala Harris You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Peter,
I’m sure by now your inbox is filled with emails from candidates asking you to donate this week before the **FEC deadline on Sunday night.** I want to take a minute and explain why these public fundraising reports are so critical in a race like this.

Unlike my opponent, I have taken a pledge to not only refuse corporate donations, but to actively work towards building a system where our government is not shaped by special interests and corporate greed. To do this, I need your help.

When this report becomes public in two weeks, it will show just how badly folks like you want to flip this seat. With all of the corporate PAC money that Dan Crenshaw has received, your individual support means so much more. We want to add **100 more individual donors** to our roster of supporters before the June 30 deadline. Let's be frank about what we're up against in this race. Tom Cotton is sitting on a war chest $2 million strong. He has a Rolodex of mega-donors and corporate PACs prepared to write him massive checks. His top donors? Ultra-conservative super PAC Club for Growth and Wall Street bankers like Goldman Sachs.

**Tom Cotton may have the GOP money machine, but we have grassroots power. And it's going to take all of us to defeat Cotton and take control of the Senate.**

Beltway insiders want to write this race off. Tom Cotton has too much money, too many political connections. They forget that the people of Arkansas sent him to Washington, and we can send him home.

**[If we hit our goal of 2,000 donations by our Sunday FEC report deadline, we'll shock the country and put Arkansas on the map as a must-win seat to take control of the Senate. Chip in $5 and help us show our grassroots strength!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7807784/74413426/-1972795140?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzUyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWE1OWVjNy0xZjk4LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VoObCPuh70aW7VyQXRYdNkTXsZe2mPNx_KoOBKm5Opk=&refcode=em190626strategy-s1&amounts=5,15,35,50,100,500,1000&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta2)**

clean_body: Cotton's GOP money machine vs. the grassroots. | | Friend, Let's be frank about what we're up against in this race. Tom Cotton is sitting on a war chest $2 million strong. He has a Rolodex of mega-donors and corporate PACs prepared to write him massive checks. His top donors? Ultra-conservative super PAC Club for Growth and Wall Street bankers like Goldman Sachs. Tom Cotton may have the GOP money machine, but we have grassroots power. And it's going to take all of us to defeat Cotton and take control of the Senate. Peter, TX-10 is ready for a change! Last election, voters across the country decided they were fed up with their Congressional representatives. Democrats won a majority in the House for the first time since 2010. Here in Texas, our campaign was able to turn a formerly safe Republican seat into a national battleground. Now we’re on our way to taking TX-10 back, and we have big news — a recent poll shows that we can flip this district!

**[We need your support to cross the finish line and restore representation to the Texas 10th! Can I count on you to chip in so we can finish the job we started?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7812542/74449093/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNmZWIxMy0zMzk4LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W9r_GTgti1Y4GK8WGDPKCIH_AqgtNjMqQjTyrFH--o=&refcode=em062619)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7812544/74449095/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNmZWIxMy0zMzk4LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W9r_GTgti1Y4GK8WGDPKCIH_AqgtNjMqQjTyrFH--o=&refcode=em062619)
TX-10 voters are tired of McCaul ignoring their concerns and ghosting on town halls, focusing on his big money donors’ priorities instead. Since I first began my campaign, I’ve been out in the district, listening to what voters want, and working to support those goals. My grassroots campaign is powered by the people, for the people, and our momentum is stronger than ever. We can finish what we started in 2018, but only with your support. [**Help my campaign bring the change this district demands to TX-10.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7812545/74449097/203122784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTNmZWIxMy0zMzk4LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9W9r_GTgti1Y4GK8WGDPKCIH_AqgtNjMqQjTyrFH--o=&refcode=em062619)

Democrats won a majority in the House for the first time since 2010. Here in Texas, our campaign was able to turn a formerly safe Republican seat into a national battleground. Now we’re on our way to taking TX-10 back, and we have big news — a recent poll shows that we can flip this district! TX-10 voters are tired of McCaul ignoring their concerns and ghosting on town halls, focusing on his big money donors’ priorities instead. Since I first began my campaign, I’ve been out in the district, listening to what voters want, and working to support those goals. My grassroots campaign is powered by the people, for the people, and our momentum is stronger than ever. We can finish what we started in 2018, but only with your support. | For the people, Mike Siegel G M T Y | Detect name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Help me stop illegal immigrants from voting nationally next...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York (FEDERAL)
body:
You don't want to miss this.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
We did it!
We stopped the liberal Democrats from registering illegal immigrants to vote in New York.
We warned that giving driver's licenses to illegal immigrants would lead to registering them to vote.
Last week, the Democrats in the State Senate passed a bill that Governor Andrew Cuomo later admitted "would have allowed undocumented people who got their driver's licenses the right to vote."
I'm proud to have successfully led the fight to derail this legislation in the State Assembly. After my colleague and I exposed the truth about the bill, the Speaker pulled it from the Assembly's agenda.
[Click here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011_pBCrQTJF0nfiuHE8DW0ypSz8Myyh1ojeI3R5o9AWg-pLtUYXfoZHKR9E8q6kUcXuD_MqSxaXlo876wsZTVGHacVqnZBMY0Tm1KkRzsPqw0Z8YdTkc1KIXL-zLS_wWlcDx1KwkP2bksca0-GXYMeI1Mx4FhUSQZavc9u29GV49oLRpNgRpeZKC6BGsLRuIWQeAbU1xAKBBTCI5hsI6fx70_9U8wj4gqBf-DK41VJPDDiO3Bhd0fyjC6ET4j3iboUUv0Hd5cHtfsXU-TSaZoUhED6IYgB9Xr3qrLL9KN5oauApxyA4PBU9HfzhCexp73&c=n_MoG6acl5aQUDoixSNy8RZjIhSquxu3UK5In_aJsW9EbeMQAI4cTw==&ch=H1AHwY-2opnaEM621L9sTF-nR3S0CcZrrGZa95azr4n2c11Egatszg==) to listen to my interview on Breitbart News Sunday explaining how it all went down.
The House of Representatives is attempting to pass similar legislation at the federal level. It's why New York City needs at least one common sense voice in Washington to push back.
---

body:
Peter – With the first of the
Democratic presidential debates kicking off tonight, all eyes are
on Democrats to see if we have what it takes to take back the
White House next year. But we can’t lose focus on holding the
House, either.

This Sunday Democrats will face our toughest test yet with
the Federal Election Commission (FEC) quarterly filing deadline.

We must have an unbeatable grassroots network to fight back
against the GOP. Our numbers will go public at midnight on
Sunday, so we’ve set a goal of activating 500 grassroots donors
by then. Will you be one of them?

name: Tennessee Democratic Party
subject: Democrats & Debates: Relentless, Rugged, and a Lil' Bit Rowdy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/JPkMZo4zlhJlTKPQMEaohPhw3VYnIW8tqfo58f0YP5U=) Dear Peter, The 2019 Three Star Dinner was a success! We owe an enormous debt of gratitude to our sponsors, our guest speakers, and the more than 750 Democrats who traveled to Nashville from every corner of the state to attend. Thank you! You helped make it a special evening for all of us. Most importantly, you helped advance our mission to elect Democrats at every level of government who share our values: Every Tennessean, no matter who you are, what you look like, where you live, who you love, or how you pray, should have the opportunity for a better life & future for you and your family. We had an exceptional slate of guest speakers, including our keynote U.S. Senator Kyrsten Sinema, Congressman Jim Cooper, U.S. Senate candidate James Mackler, Madison County Chair Byron Elam, Ray Holloman, and Luis Mata. Check out a complete photo recap of the evening's events and guests [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/ZfMWzGHVdBcKiZ9S7xvPVER2vU_bN6vQXlS69ChFctw=?tab=album&album_id=10156989431635831&__xts__%5B0%5D=68.ARDcgI0FqlQH49d145FQ5Z3c4SLwXovaGMNy_ZQQ1BaNokm26xrhGInSPwdngc42VD109ZqG4UEtV15rr84celoxzUsrFz44QFH7WydYLbRMTPVDC1NB3_0cgtdr3UgjjGeZEXZEy4DtAffwRc860WObvqs3XeEBlo4WOtwm5IZT7kptfoiz1uCgEo5lEHo3XmhUihEt5Mlzkv69QxFyyz79mQpxazfwyaXMP0GVdSyQHJxf3WmCr_gs7YJDohceHU15aIL0AwCk3Wurt_yrC8CEVBYLDCmd125WyBdy1CFdxfIn6-IOQrUJ2dlZt_dfGSn0Ni-wXamXQsQl8D1dPtYQCgD-cEFdHTsxfSXMxUJBdBECndLo9UTvufDivvYJ6ljoK-HXsZWyXu1xz6PezG3t76TjXyN9f_ATFBtC9ARF3yfnZ1XxqU3QSGVauBdTYMKQL9LkfJTUQnWrvjoSMafpSBJ_JOdXCJTw9Yudgl6zHdUI5Fo7LKgZIesP0P6UeJ5rHVTA3YEyt5uymfnC&__tn__=-UC-R). During her keynote address, Senator Sinema said it best -- Tennessee Democrats are **relentless, rugged, and a lil ' bit rowdy**. This especially rings true for our democratic legislators. Tennessee House and Senate Democratic Caucus members believe in freedom, equality, opportunity, and justice for all Tennesseans and they've dauntlessly defended those values in Nashville. That's why we were proud to present them with the 2019 True Grit Award on Saturday evening. Check out our True Grit Award video highlighting their efforts below. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/i5lpzTi5RZaSAUbwgn6K9-FqpqQsg1ap68tp-7exj3E=?v=oizY5AiokJ4) **THE DEBATES!** As you know, tonight is the first of two Democratic presidential primary debates to be held this week. **** The first debates will take place over two back-to-back nights at 9 p.m. ET on June 26 and 27, 2019, in Miami, Florida. The debate will be broadcast in prime time on NBC, MSNBC, and Telemundo, and will be live streamed on the [Tennessee Democratic Party Facebook page](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/tt-Hh3qDtgwW0d-fWfT5iHIt1g68RG-2D31PUXh1OhA=)! And many TNDP county Democratic Parties are holding **DEBATE WATCH PARTIES**. Check your email, Facebook, and Twitter for more information about local events in your area. **Night 1** : Cory Booker, Julian Castro, Bill de Blasio, John Delaney, Tulsi Gabbard, Jay Inslee, Amy Klobuchar, Beto O'Rourke, Tim Ryan, Elizabeth Warren **Night 2** : Michael Bennet, Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Kirsten Gillibrand, Kamala Harris, John Hickenlooper, Bernie Sanders, Eric Swalwell, Marianne Williamson, Andrew Yang This is an exciting time to be a voter **with so many qualified Democratic candidates** stepping up to talk about our values, to speak to voters directly and tell them who we are and what we stand for. When I first became your TNDP Chair five years ago and started traveling around the state, I heard a lot of voters saying, "I didn't leave the Democratic Party, the Democratic Party left me." But now I'm hearing, "I didn't leave the Republican party, Donald Trump and the Republican Party left me!" What that means is that right now, voters in Tennessee, and in every other state in our country, are looking for an alternative to the Republican Party. **Right now, it is our opportunity to tell voters: **
* Democrats believe that if you work hard for a living, you should be able to afford your mortgage AND your medicine, you should be able to feed your family AND fix your car, you should be able to take time off to spend with your children AND look forward to a secure and dignified retirement.

* Democrats believe that climate change is real, it's a national security issue, and we need to take swift, bold action NOW.

* Democrats believe that public education should be fully funded, no teacher in the country should struggle to make ends meet, and the school to prison pipeline must be disrupted.

* Democrats believe that we will not be completely free until we can ALL walk into a church or synagogue, a movie theater, a nightclub, or a school, without the threat of gun violence and bloodshed.

* Democrats believe in social security, the minimum wage, the Children's Health Insurance Program, medicare, and protecting people with pre-existing conditions.

* Democrats believe in bringing back prosperity to rural America because we believe the rural and small-town way of life is worth fighting for. We believe that you shouldn't have to leave your hometown in search of a good job with decent pay.

* Democrats want money out of politics, fair redistricting, and want to make it easier and not harder to vote.

* And most of all, Democrats believe in integrity, transparency, and accountability, because we know that no one is above the law, especially not Donald Trump.

Wherever you are and wherever you watch, enjoy! **ACTION ALERT: Support the Tennessee AFL-CIO and Communications Workers of America** **** It's time we stop rewarding corporations for sending American jobs overseas. Join the Tennessee AFL-CIO Labor Council and Communications Workers of America for a Day of Action this **Friday, June 28** by calling your Congressperson and telling them to support the U.S. Call Center Worker and Consumer Protection Act and the No Tax Breaks for Outsourcing Act. The U.S. Call Center Worker and Consumer Protection Act (S. 1792 and H.R. 3219) will help stop companies from sending jobs overseas by requiring callers be told the location of the call center which they are speaking, offering callers the opportunity to be connected to a U.S. based call center, and making U.S. companies who offshore their call center jobs ineligible for certain federal grants and taxpayer-funded loans.
The No Tax Breaks for Outsourcing Act (S. 780 and H.R. 1711) will stop rewarding companies that ship jobs overseas and reverses the incentives to send jobs to other countries that was embedded in the Republican Tax Cut and Jobs Act of 2017. Click [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/NEr0MMX9dJaS4Rx6iEHGbR4FNgvsBbU5I4PXRPkIv9A=) here to find your Congressman. **LEAD 2020 PODCAST** The LEAD 2020 Podcast is connecting Democrats around the state with leaders at every level and in every corner of the Democratic Party. Listen as they provide the know-how, inspiration, and vision to help move our Party and country forward. The LEAD 2020 Podcast is available on Apple Podcasts and Spotify. Sponsor an episode of the podcast and we'll highlight your group or organization at the start of the show! Get started [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/_VzKUJMhnghzSRSPqwAvzUQzJF33Kac9UypXki0-1kA=). All the best,
Mary \--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party **HELP US AMPLIFY OUR MESSAGE** We can always use the help of dedicated Democrats like you to help us amplify our message. It's easy, just click on the links below and amplify us! Tennessee Democratic Party [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/scY_z3BPNlsxuK-r3Ev3G03SkPx3rp2SlGH3OU9uITM=) | [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/XDOeVKWdchWwP3UpsCY4VvrFPI_uFAOTZyC9ed5XsJs=) | [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/JinZwoCQYG4qRnLku1pDinuQFlBkOzvQIsuGn53cGT0=) | Subscribe to [LEAD 2020 Podcast](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/IlUGUhWzJo4vf6sEmhxOe2UoiWThGnzANys6VaeG4jM=) Chair Mary Mancini [Twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/IvniG6PdllNsXHNJX08BtrV35JxddCsRtOCX0T2iw4Y=) | [Facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/M5wsMmefEc6pMUGM5o7_AG4tM1k6RYWgOb4jgCVX9Yg=) | [Instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/e_EOmMJsO8c04-QC9aBsMs-fCq0kjLIRnZ3NUuou3b4=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LZjJkrnxhKpdAOZkG9nU_v9QALgr47KXkoyY9vWDBZk=/MoH_ozngVfp_zzBXEhKVqSSn10Zt2fgWKp_-yutMl3w=)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: 🏳️‍🌈Sign on to support the Equality Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
There are certain days that stay with you for a long time, Peter.
| | There are certain days that stay with you for a long time, Peter.

One of those days happened four years ago today, when the Supreme Court made marriage equality the law of the land. After years of fighting for the most basic and human right -- _to love and be loved_ \-- our LGBT friends and neighbors made history.

Another one of those days happened a little over a month ago. On May 17, our Democratic House passed the Equality Act, a bill that extends federal civil rights protections to LGBT Americans and outlaws discrimination of any kind on the basis of sexual orientation.

**I can 't think of a better word to describe what I felt on both of these days -- when I heard the Supreme Court's decision and when I voted for this landmark legislation -- than "pride." **

I have been hoping for weeks now that the Senate would introduce and pass the Equality Act, and I'd feel that sense of pride again. But so far, there has been no action. Instead, our fellow Americans continue to be marginalized. They risk being fired, refused housing, or denied services because of whom they love.

**Every American -- regardless of their sexual orientation -- should be treated equally, with respect and dignity, under the law. It 's that simple. **

[**Peter, if you agree that our nation 's founding principle of equal rights for all should apply to all citizens, please sign my petition urging the Senate to hold a vote on the Equality Act today. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/A61EhuhWT9lUeVh76Rv-3QxGT8CpXjbH7ACVBgc9n3w=/-iZ-58ASEoDLmwt8vIQw1v4fE9J_Ho1hc0uluxf6a58=) | **[SIGN IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.myngp.com/el/A61EhuhWT9lUeVh76Rv-3QxGT8CpXjbH7ACVBgc9n3w=/-iZ-58ASEoDLmwt8vIQw1v4fE9J_Ho1hc0uluxf6a58=)**
---
We need to stand with members of our community who are living in the shadows.

In solidarity,
_\-- Abigail _

| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/A61EhuhWT9lUeVh76Rv-3QxGT8CpXjbH7ACVBgc9n3w=/K-gNOZXyzmckbwUbopLExTsGPh2kTrG7AqqERBI3nG4=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/A61EhuhWT9lUeVh76Rv-3QxGT8CpXjbH7ACVBgc9n3w=/2tx8RZmtl6X2uwRGQBlNnfbnwhTyDeZEaS0_oOrHtW8=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

Glen Allen, VA 23058

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: the biggest moment of our campaign so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is it, everyone: GOP candidates are starting to launch their campaigns to run against me for New Hampshire's Senate seat. And, they're already promising to support Trump 100%.
This is the biggest moment of the campaign so far, so Maggie suggested that I reach out to you. Here's what we know for sure: The only way we're going to protect New Hampshire's Senate seat and take back the Senate is if everyone - and I mean everyone - pitches in $3 or more right now. ([**Click here to give now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc203/2a380d31/3e3a4adb/f13a91/2672571788/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjZfTVdINENKUzFfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190626_MWH4CJS1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto"))
It's all hands on deck, team. CBS News says this race could decide Senate control - and Mitch McConnell's right-wing group has already launched attack ads to defeat me and maintain its Senate majority. If they get their way, we know that means more attempts to sabotage and repeal the Affordable Care Act, more tax breaks for big oil corporations, and more restrictions on women's health care like the ones in Alabama.
GOP groups are now spending more money to defeat me than all the other in-cycle Democratic senators combined - and I can't match their millions and stop my opponent without your help.
The next few days are the most important of this campaign. Every dollar is going to matter, and what you do right now could make or break our chance to take back the Senate for Democrats:
[**Please, donate every dollar you can right now to help defend New Hampshire 's Senate seat so we can take back the Senate for Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc203/2a380d31/3e3a4adb/f13a91/2672571788/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjZfTVdINENKUzFfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190626_MWH4CJS1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Jeanne
> [Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc203/2a380d31/3e3a4adb/f13a91/2672571788/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MjZfTVdINENKUzFfUk8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20190626_MWH4CJS1_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc203/2a380d31/3e3a4adb/f13a92/2672571788/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Tim Ryan
subject: Tonight's the night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:

Team,

Tonight's the first Presidential debate and it's going to be crowded up there because I'm bringing all of you onstage with me -- sort of.

The stories I've heard as I've traveled across the country these last few months have inspired and challenged me to build a campaign that can change our future.

I want to give you one more chance to share your thoughts before I go onstage because YOU are at the heart of this campaign.

name: Tim Kaine
subject: A complex problem with a simple solution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'm writing today to ask you to support one of my Democratic colleagues who is up for re-election in 2020, Gary Peters.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek:

[**I'm writing today to ask you to support one of my Democratic colleagues who is up for re-election in 2020, Gary Peters.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085c9/2830349971/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-peters?source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&amount=30&20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Im+writing+today+to+ask+you+to+support+o&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters")

Gary is one of only two Democrats up for re-election in a state that President Trump won -- which means he's got a whole lot of eyes on his race and a whole lot of outside money and support working against him.

We all know that taking back the White House is critical. Believe me -- I'm ready to see a Democratic leader in the Oval Office! **But I also spend my days in the halls of the Senate, and I can tell you firsthand that re-electing our strong Senate Democrats is one of the most important things we can do next year.** I've said this before, and I'll say it again -- the number one reason we find ourselves stuck in legislative gridlock is that Republican leadership blocks our efforts to make progress. It's a complex problem, but the solution is simple: _We need to do everything in our power to re-elect Democrats like Gary Peters and flip Senate seats wherever we possibly can._

[**Will you make an online donation before the June 30th FEC deadline to say you're ready to take back the Senate?**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085c8/2830349971/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-peters?source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&amount=30&20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+make+an+online+donation+before+&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters")

In the Senate, Gary and I have worked together to defend access to quality, affordable health care, protect our natural resources like the Great Lakes and the Chesapeake Bay, prepare our kids for the future, and help small businesses and our economy grow.

Having a leader like Gary in the Senate is hugely important -- but I need your help to make sure he stays there. He's already got an opponent, a Republican who says he supports Trump's agenda "2000%." We can't risk losing Gary's seat to someone like that.

**This Sunday at midnight is a fundraising deadline established by the Federal Election Commission. Any support that candidates can secure before then will be released publicly, and it'll send a message to their opponents and to the outside groups looking to defeat them that they're ready for a fight.**

[**Please join me in making sure my friend and colleague Gary Peters has a strong showing of support.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085cf/2830349971/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-peters?source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&amount=30&20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Please+join+me+in+making+sure+my+friend+&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters")

Thank you for standing with me and with Senate Democrats.

-Tim Kaine
| ******[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085ce/2830349971/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-peters?source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&amount=30&20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters")******

We believe that emails are a crucial way for Tim to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085c1/2830349971/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters")

Team Kaine is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your sustained support is critical to Tim. If you'd like to donate, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f177c/3e0906/7b7e7ba8/3e3085c0/2830349971/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-support?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters&source=20190626_1_FR_TK_Peters") Thanks for having Tim's back!

It's a complex problem, but the solution is simple: We need to do everything in our power to re-elect Democrats like Gary Peters and flip Senate seats wherever we possibly can. "" In the Senate, Gary and I have worked together to defend access to quality, affordable health care, protect our natural resources like the Great Lakes and the Chesapeake Bay, prepare our kids for the future, and help small businesses and our economy grow. Having a leader like Gary in the Senate is hugely important -- but I need your help to make sure he stays there. He's already got an opponent, a Republican who says he supports Trump's agenda "2000%." We can't risk losing Gary's seat to someone like that. This Sunday at midnight is a fundraising deadline established by the Federal Election Commission. Any support that candidates can secure before then will be released publicly, and it'll send a message to their opponents and to the outside groups looking to defeat them that they're ready for a fight. "" Thank you for standing with me and with Senate Democrats. -Tim Kaine | **** ""** | "" "" ""

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Why I fight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em_header&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em_header&noskip=true]
Dear Friend –

I’m a fighter. I have been my whole life.

>From standing up to the school bully when I was 7 years old, to taking on big banks, airlines, and chemical manufacturers as the first woman partner at my law firm, to reducing crime by 42% and growing an economy that worked for everyone as mayor of Georgia’s second largest city – I fought the good fight, and I won.

But my biggest fight is yet to come: I’m running for the U.S. Senate to put an end to the dysfunction plaguing Washington, and to get our government working for the people.

To win this fight, we have to bring people together in an unprecedented way. That’s why I’m asking you to make a $5 donation before our June 30 fundraising deadline so that we can reach people across Georgia to build this campaign. Will you donate today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062619&noskip=true]

David Perdue will not be easy to beat. He’ll have all the worst special interests lined up to donate to his campaign and he’ll have millions in outside dark money running negative ads against us.

There’s only one way to beat him: by joining together to make sure every voter knows that David Perdue has failed the people of Georgia, and in this election we are going to vote him out.

David Perdue failed us when he supported a governor who has taken away our voting and reproductive rights.

David Perdue failed us when he voted to confirm Justice Brett Kavanaugh and introduced three anti-choice bills in the Senate this year alone.

And David Perdue failed us when he voted against disaster relief for the victims of Hurricane Irma, and when it took him 238 days to get aid to the victims of Hurricane Michael.

That’s why I fight.

We can win this battle, but we need to do it together. Donate today and help spread the word on David Perdue’s failed record. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062619&noskip=true]

This fight is big, but it’s one we will win.

Join me today.

Best regards,

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/74264/images/Teresa%20Signature.png]

Teresa Tomlinson

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt-eoq?refcode=em062619&noskip=true]

<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/why-i-fight/]
PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'll be tuned in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Friend, tonight is the first Democratic debate of this presidential primary. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771792/691c9bd/6dbe3807/11a42324/3454198682/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")

| Friend, tonight is the first Democratic debate of this presidential primary.

I'll be tuned in, and I'll be watching the folks onstage--many of whom I know personally and consider friends--with respect, curiosity, and an open mind.

**That said, I know that I 'm bringing something to the table in this primary that nobody else does: a proven track record, as an entrepreneur, Mayor, and two-time Governor, of bringing people together to get progressive things done.**

Not just talk about them. Get them done.

I'll be in touch with more thoughts later today. Until then--**[my team is working hard to hit their fundraising goals. Can you chip in today?](https://secure.hickenlooper. body:
This election can and will decide the future of our state [ ](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0f40c293bbd049a2847761031b0e436b&_e=-EJhdybYchVF-2SEtaZ4Hc1kgOB6N8hT2WkeU9azpAd9OWG0Mt5BbQ4WypylnohGAoRRyhqpnqgdTTaFaQ2qLK5xK8dZTyIoYmNb-nMYCLgbbUruf6kSDr1iosuADRs7rO-OJPXloWu0jKr58RGzwFRxx9PLbiWj0woS3uhi7-NHvzMoYsXvzCxgG5XCE8cHjlLntNJGbbfuMJXTEFYD8rSYilVF64PNW8g9JsZd4aB7Q11d0vU4jVGb2sDCwUCNgekco4CesT9UmoR7nCYUJt0D1O0G2ebEGOXbCDIDZxE6M_6B9ndse65ZV2pMBAW0sG1bYnIbvnpwr1mwwjm6-A%3D%3D) Everyone, In just a minute I’m going to ask for you to donate to my campaign, _but first I want to explain why this is so important._ Voters have a choice this November, and it’s no exaggeration to say that this election can and will decide the future of our state. We can either continue in the positive direction we’ve been moving, or we can allow over regulation, anti-religious liberty and radical abortion policies to overrun Mississippi. I’m doing all I can to spread my message, but at the end of the day the choice is up to Mississippians like you. I need your name on that list. Thanks for being on the team, I couldn’t do this without you.

Sincerely,

clean_body: This election can and will decide the future of our state Everyone, In just a minute I’m going to ask for you to donate to my campaign, but first I want to explain why this is so important. Voters have a choice this November, and it’s no exaggeration to say that this election can and will decide the future of our state. We can either continue in the positive direction we’ve been moving, or we can allow over regulation, anti-religious liberty and radical abortion policies to overrun Mississippi. I’m doing all I can to spread my message, but at the end of the day the choice is up to Mississippians like you. We have an end of month deadline approaching at the end of June, and when that deadline hits we will make our fundraising numbers public. Higher fundraising numbers prove just how many Mississippians are standing with me, so my team and I are setting a goal of before the end of June. I need your name on that list. The clock is ticking until the end of June, so donate as soon as you can. Thanks for being on the team, I couldn’t do this without you. Sincerely, Tate Reeves Paid for by Tate for Governor | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: VIDEO: Why I'm running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
When I arrived in Helena, Montana 25 years ago as a refugee of the Liberian civil war, my sense of purpose was restored. I knew that day that I'd spend my life giving back to this state and this country that gave me a second chance and provided my family with opportunity.
**[As I kick off my campaign for U.S. Senate, I want to share part of that story with you. Watch our new launch video now, then contribute $5 to help us start this campaign strong.](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190626&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
[](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190626&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My family will serve this country until the day we die. Six months after I came to the U.S., I enlisted in the Army National Guard. I went on to serve in the Army Reserves and Navy Reserves for over twenty years. My wife and daughter both chose to serve this nation as well.
That spirit of service and sacrifice for our state and our country is what led me to serve as mayor of Helena--and now to run to represent all Montanans in the U.S. Senate.
As your next Senator, I will deliver on health care. I will do everything in my power to address climate change. I will support our public schools and teachers. I will stand with our unions. And I will fight to defend our public lands. But I need you with me in the battles ahead.
[**Watch our new campaign launch video now to hear why I will always fight for Montana and this nation that we love. Then, contribute $5 to jumpstart my campaign for Senate.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190626&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

**[watch the video](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-video?refcode=em190626&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477a/1e3760f0/69ca6b4a/5f7ea909/3535959452/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477a/1e3760f0/69ca6b4a/5f7ea906/3535959452/VEsA/ "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616477a/1e3760f0/69ca6b4a/5f7ea907/3535959452/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=footer")

name: Rosie Castro
subject: humbly asking:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af63e/2080056983/VEsH/ "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")
---
| | [_**I hope you 'll give me a second to explain what tonight means for my family -- and if you can, please consider chipping in $15 before midnight to my son, Julian's historic campaign for President. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af63d/2080056983/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190626_em_fr_b1_rosie_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Tonight, I'll watch my son Julian take the Presidential debate stage. I'm struggling to put into words what this means to me. My mother came to this country as an orphan when she was just 7 years old. She provided for us by cleaning houses. She never complained. She took such pride in the opportunity to make a living in this great country. And now, her grandson will be on the Presidential debate stage tonight. She never could have imagined this. **Juli an's campaign is about so much more than winning the Presidency -- it's the product of my mother's sacrifice -- it's proof of the American Dream. ** It's about everyday Americans who deserve to be led by fellow everyday Americans. It's about leaders who will fight with everything they have for us -- because they are us. [_**That 's why I'm asking you to fight for Julian tonight, because he shares your burden -- and he won't be relieved of it until you are, too. >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af63d/2080056983/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190626_em_fr_b1_rosie_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") I know every dollar is precious to your family. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af625/2080056983/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af624/2080056983/VEsHBg/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcd97/3eb3e2fc/43eff5fc/744af623/2080056983/VEsHAQ/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Jessica Boad
subject: double down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team, this is a huge week for us.

In fact, it's the most important week of our campaign so far.

Tomorrow, Michael steps onto the debate stage in Miami.

And Sunday is our first FEC deadline since Michael jumped into this race.

We know that Twitter bots and pundits have been betting against this campaign from the start, [but your support has helped us defy the odds.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaddf/134673f2/1125aa3/6996abc4/1738319569/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_062619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Team, we 're betting on you again today. Here's the bottom line:

[We're not taking money from corporate special interests. Instead, we're counting on the grassroots support of tens of thousands of friends like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaddf/134673f2/1125aa3/6996abc4/1738319569/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B2_062619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

If we're going to keep getting Michael's message out about cleaning up corruption and fixing our broken politics, then we need you to step up big time.

When our FEC report goes public after Sunday it's essential our filing reflect Michael's growing grassroots strength across the country.

Jessica Boad

When our FEC report goes public after Sunday it's essential our filing reflect Michael's growing grassroots strength across the country. "" | "" Thanks for stepping up. Jessica Boad National Finance Director, Bennet for America | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats’ Outrageous Border Cruelty
body:
"Democrats are finally acknowledging the border crisis they claimed didn’t exist, yet many still want to deny aid to suffering migrants." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb8b9e6937&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats’ Outrageous Border Cruelty**

“Democrats are finally acknowledging the border crisis they claimed didn’t exist, yet many still want to deny aid to suffering migrants. It’s beyond cruel,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“Humanitarian aid should be a top priority. If Dems truly care about the conditions of migrants packed in squalid facilities, they’ll back funding to address those conditions even if some of that money might go to enforcement.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=181b7bfcaa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Peace in the Middle East can only be achieved if it comes with a pathway for people to improve their lives, US President Donald Trump’s top adviser Jared Kushner said in Bahrain on Tuesday, in explaining why his team is rolling out the economic chapter of their Mideast peace vision before the political one,” Herb Keinon reports for [_The Jerusalem Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b43528bac6&e=3ee4985eea). “While politicians pay lip service, the world moves forward and the Palestinians continue to be left behind,” Kushner said.
---
|
---
| “There is a crisis on the southern border of the United States. Customs and Border Patrol agents are being overwhelmed by a surge of families seeking asylum. Border facilities do not have the necessary resources to care for the immigrants in many cases and conditions are sub-standard,” the [_Boston Herald_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0f6206746c&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes. Congressional Democrats complain—then stonewall the Administration’s push for humanitarian aid. “It is astounding that a political party so loudly aghast at US-run ‘concentration camps,’ does not feel strongly compelled to legislate them away.”
---
|
---
| “Two US soldiers tasked with helping safeguard the US-Mexico border rescued a woman and . . . her child Thursday, saving the migrant family from drowning as they attempted to cross into the country,” Ryan Browne reports for [CNN](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf0f420cc2&e=3ee4985eea). One of those soldiers, Army Staff Sgt. Michael Mathews, “jumped into the water to rescue the woman and her child, while 1st Lt. Samuel Mueller used his shirt as a makeshift lifeline until [U.S. Customs and Border Protection] agents arrived and threw them a rescue line,” a statement from the U.S. Northern Command read.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06cde48aeb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=441dff9b75&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f5268a68b1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

We’re very close to hitting our goals – just a few hundred dollars away – but we still need your support. This race is one of the most important in the country. If Democrats beat us, they’ll have one more vote towards impeaching President Trump and they’ll have one more vote to support the socialist Green New Deal. And if we win, we’ll be able to continue our historic progress on deregulating businesses and securing our border, among other victories we have had for the American people. That’s why a generous donor has offered to MATCH any grassroots contributions made before the deadline hits -- because he knows just how important this race is. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you! Ted | | | COUNTDOWN TO DEADLINE | | | DAYS | | HOURS | | MINUTES | | SECONDS | | | Ted Budd for Congress PO Box 97127 Raleigh, NC 27624 Paid for by Ted Budd for Congress | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Notice: Total donor match is not to exceed the individual legal limit of $2,800.

name: Fran Conole
subject: where it counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | | Our first publicly reported FEC filing deadline is Sunday at midnight.

**We aren 't taking corporate PAC money, and are 100% reliant on grassroots donations.**

[**Fund our mission with a donation before the first important deadline of our campaign!**](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Fund+our+mission+with+a+donation+before+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_1_1&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_1_1")
---
John Katko votes with Donald Trump and against getting big money out of politics and restoring voting rights. In the military, I learned that most people's behavior can be explained by analyzing what behaviors they are incentivized to do.

Through that lens, it makes sense that Katko regularly votes to betray our best interests. He does the bidding of wealthy, special interest donors and ignores the good people of Central New York.

That's why our urgent mission is to save the middle-class by replacing politicians like Katko who vote against our interests with public servants who will fight every day for working families.

**Another thing I learned in the military is that success requires proper resources, and on midnight this Sunday we face the first public Federal Election Commission filing deadline.** This means that Katko, President Trump, and the national media will be looking at our numbers closely.

They would love to see us fall short.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out to personally ask you to contribute before our FEC filing deadline, Sunday at midnight. We need to raise $21,541 to reach our goal before our numbers become public.**](https://conole.bsd. name: Mike Moore
subject: Support My Friend Jim Hood
body:
|
---
I'm reaching out because I want you to know that in this Governor's race there's only one person for the job, and I'm proud to be supporting Jim Hood.
Friend,

I am writing today to encourage you to support my good friend, Jim Hood.

I first got to know Jim when he worked for me when I was attorney general, and I was proud to see him succeed me in this role.

As attorney general, and as a former district attorney, Jim has repeatedly shown that he cares about doing the right thing -- whether that's fighting for crime victims, protecting our children, taking on large corporations harming Mississippi, or prosecuting the leader of the 1964 murder of three civil rights workers.

Now, Jim is running for governor for all the right reasons -- he's running to build a better Mississippi for everyone.

**[But for Jim to win he needs your support.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KM5uQicrY2eiAu_XuDRwEWxQbCD3DjVta37Ek61QnXw=/t58JGGgDPjK4GMRhuAad7NnhEFybs3_e7RnoiLOCSKk=?refcode=20190626&amount=25)**

Backed by special interest money, his opponent Lt. Governor Tate Reeves, has over $6 million in the bank.

**For Jim to win, he needs the support of hard working Mississippians who want a state government that puts their interests ahead of politicians and large corporations.**

From expanding pre-K statewide, to accepting one billion per year in federal dollars to keep rural hospitals open and expand health coverage to 300,000 Mississippians, to fixing roads and bridges that will create jobs and attract new businesses, to making college more affordable, to cutting the grocery tax -- Jim Hood is about improving the lives of Mississippi families.

**[Please dig deep to provide Jim whatever support you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/KM5uQicrY2eiAu_XuDRwEWxQbCD3DjVta37Ek61QnXw=/t58JGGgDPjK4GMRhuAad7NnhEFybs3_e7RnoiLOCSKk=?refcode=20190626&amount=25)**

With Jim Hood as governor, we can move Mississippi forward.

Sincerely,
Mike Moore
38th Attorney General of Mississippi

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/KM5uQicrY2eiAu_XuDRwEWxQbCD3DjVta37Ek61QnXw=/t58JGGgDPjK4GMRhuAad7NnhEFybs3_e7RnoiLOCSKk=?refcode=20190626&amount=25)
---
|

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/KM5uQicrY2eiAu_XuDRwEWxQbCD3DjVta37Ek61QnXw=/cK2ffqx1aB-EHhrg2ae5Nb6BXID1gWoIcmNHYYpP0F8=). Friends of Jim Hood
P.O. Box 16647
Jackson MS 39236 United States
********** **********

name: The Markey Campaign
subject: circling back

body:
| | | Hello - Ed Markey is asking for your help, and we wanted to follow up.

Trump is desperate to launch a right-wing opponent against Ed. National Republicans will look at Ed's public FEC report after the deadline to see if there are any weaknesses to exploit. We can't give them any sign.

_**[Will you stand with Ed and make one of the 400 donations we need to stay on track to reach our goal and show a massive grassroots team behind Ed?](http://ma.edmarkey. name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Perdue?=
subject: SURVEY: What would you ask?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
take the survey by 9pm | |
---
| | [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c5ad6831c4&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| |
#
Tonight, the two dozen Democrats running for President start their primary debates. Many of them have already been to Georgia. **All of them support** **radical policies that would take America down the road to socialism.**

It’s up to us to hold them accountable, and I want to hear from you. [**What would YOU ask the Democrats running for President?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=a7ad96894d&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e524ff7c1c&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| The Democrats are telling us exactly what they want to do. They want socialized medicine. They want higher taxes. They want the “Green New Deal,” which would crush our economy and cost trillions.

**It’s up to us to hold these Democrats accountable for supporting such radical socialist policies.**

Together, we can keep up the pressure. Together, we can share our outsider message of delivering results. **Together, we can keep President Trump in the White House and a Republican majority in the U.S. Senate.**

[**Respond here and let me know what you'd ask. **](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=bbc5adc4f6&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David
---
| [SUBMIT YOUR QUESTION](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=b0ac5057e7&e=02cd889ad3 "SUBMIT YOUR QUESTION")
---

---

---
| We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
---

[Privacy Policy](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2a89c4ba25&e=02cd889ad3)

body:
|

Team,

This is the moment we've been building towards since day one.

It's Tim's chance to tell voters nationwide exactly what sets him apart -- and I've got no doubt that by tomorrow our movement will be twice its size!

I know you haven't had a chance to give yet so I have to ask:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes=20for=20Senate?=
subject: Courtland Joins President Trump's Finance Committee
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=7f754966cf&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| **_Friend, it's been a while since we last spoke but...
CHANEL AND I HAVE UPDATES!_**
---
|
---
| Since our campaign, Chanel has joined One America News Network as their newest White House Correspondent. We are both very proud that Chanel has the opportunity to cover the President with such a patriotic group of journalists. After closing my campaign, I fired up my national security think tank, and most recently, **_accepted a position with President Trump’s Victory Finance Committee_**. My enthusiastic support for **_President Trump_** , originally grounded by his **_National Security_** positions, has only continued to strengthen on all fronts – our President is a miracle worker for what he has accomplished **_with our economy, with diplomacy, and by cutting bureaucratic regulation_**.

I want to take this opportunity to invite you to invest in the future of our nation. By donating with President Donald J. Trump’s Victory Committee, you are investing in four more years of:
---
|
---
| **Action Speaks Louder Than Words!**

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=0794bb8bed&e=9da9b0ca31)
President Trump is truly supported by the working men and women of our Armed Services - because they know the President is honored to be their Commander and Chief. The pride that President Trump is genuine, and reflected in out military's appreciation of him.

President Trump understands how to successfully negotiate with foreign leaders while maintaining the highest intrust of the American people.

President Trump knows the importance in cutting regulations in an effort to relieve the American people from suppressive regulations. President Trump has been slashing taxes and bureaucratic regulations in an effort to restore the liberty our founding fathers set into place.

The economy is thriving once again! President Trump vowed to be the "great jobs President God ever created." Despite countless attacks on his administration, our President has achieved the kind of economic growth fitting for our great nation. President Trump kept his promise.

This is a President who cares for the American people. President Trump's service to our great nation reflects his love for the people.

This is a President who works night and day without pay. Our President stepped out of his billionaire lifestyle to work for the American people and restore the country he loves so much. He didn't have to do it, but he knew God has given him the ability to accomplish this great task.

---
| I’ve been given the responsibility of ensuring our President remains in the White House for four more years. I also take on the reasonability of ensuring Presidents Trump policies and vision continues for decades to come.

This is your opportunity to [invest in this President](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=c99bb16a70&e=9da9b0ca31) and his vision.
I’m asking you to donate what you can.
I’m asking you to invest in our great American Constitutional Republic. By doing so, you turn the tide on the socialist agenda behind the modern day democrat party.

Let’s keep America’s President in the White House four more years.
[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=2a0cdc9b32&e=9da9b0ca31)
---
| Onward to Victory!
~Team Trump
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/about?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=d0124976a5&e=9da9b0ca31&c=099d7939bf) [unsubscribe from this list](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=d0124976a5&e=9da9b0ca31&c=099d7939bf) [update subscription preferences](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=d0124976a5&e=9da9b0ca31)
Courtland Sykes for Senate * Box 8526 * Springfield, Mo 65801 * USA

---

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: dem debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Tonight on a crowded stage of Democratic presidential hopefuls, we’ll hear ten different plans that take us in the same wrong direction- higher.......
Friend,

Tonight on a crowded stage of Democratic presidential hopefuls, we’ll hear ten different plans that take us in the same wrong direction- higher taxes, less choice and less freedom.

I served our country to protect the American dream, not so politicians could argue why socialism will be different this time, or why Americans need less freedom and more government.

[**Help me fight back and defend our values. Chip in $50, $25 or just $10 right now to reach our end of quarter fundraising goal**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=77536386e77342cb895af0f3a6d66792&_e=KhNC6EiM2NrHvYCr0qsqf6jhiaJbnIOfR-MFYmPvWH8nr2yr2ygKLrvnA9Bqq8x0pPzHlAW7xFO69KWRRZ8aFqEcV7fBRmQRuBeM7-rwPnT2RQHTh60elxsUvZJiVnj7K6pTi10afKdypULxrJFpMq_VpCZt0xjGaNUrB2LOSwI3K8cYeOEte7XrD4fyPZwgSZzGfm52CL-2r7a_ZU_7bX1c-DV8QOdPC3f-d6nKA1Y2uVtXwMSyZDQcST7vBISLXlJRybn1rsxXBFhuWRR4SgTGNUXIOzBgZzC1qk_tmn-Ba9qsDQQTOWQ0uArQojcyfsnZ07xCRWq27vuwIMV2cmYfCpVqTR5-xElhUlN7nWIwzaqwL1BsxXjoi1ufDT3l-1WUlppXnZOenUaC360lVH_41O5LEB4rXrNKnwkB1RLNHSbKLQF9FNUmepFZNw5O)**.**

Duty, honor and county are the words I carried with me in combat and on overseas deployments. But those aren’t the values that will be on display tonight, and they’re certainly not the values I see in Washington.

**I’m on a mission to flip TX-07 back to red, but I cannot win without your help. **
****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=77536386e77342cb895af0f3a6d66792&_e=KhNC6EiM2NrHvYCr0qsqf6jhiaJbnIOfR-MFYmPvWH8nr2yr2ygKLrvnA9Bqq8x0pPzHlAW7xFO69KWRRZ8aFqEcV7fBRmQRuBeM7-rwPnT2RQHTh60elxsUvZJiVnj7K6pTi10afKdypULxrJFpMq_VpCZt0xjGaNUrB2LOSwI3K8cYeOEte7XrD4fyPZwgSZzGfm52CL-2r7a_ZU_7bZ_f-1IxbudHHR5cnPbVP0p92FfcGhEAjT7y7YkbsKKd8PGnJlyayxus0iFDpHy585brjFt_Lp9S625sjKarPsQKbEBjM_SXtU0VA59tQFjlplfwVO9TP2f4Rej72U4VEwwgwzR2vCDOFy95Uh7lo4DUBpUAe876bpK1rY_M79zIrE85Fmx4ER7_hUap6PDHUVe4nioloUr4wK9fJXbsI3jN-_cu26GyXlxpIhcevfs_)****
---

The end of the fundraising quarter is rapidly approaching. That is how our campaign will be judged. Your donation of **[$50, $25 or $10](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=77536386e77342cb895af0f3a6d66792&_e=KhNC6EiM2NrHvYCr0qsqf6jhiaJbnIOfR-MFYmPvWH8nr2yr2ygKLrvnA9Bqq8x0pPzHlAW7xFO69KWRRZ8aFqEcV7fBRmQRuBeM7-rwPnT2RQHTh60elxsUvZJiVnj7K6pTi10afKdypULxrJFpMq_VpCZt0xjGaNUrB2LOSwI3K8cYeOEte7XrD4fyPZwgSZzGfm52CL-2r7a_ZU_7beDiX6vNgHdZw3d3IJqqE2KEydE7CuV2oqQ0TseYgeae3rTVD4IC8jwiREo7F0R_y0-V_1p3AEkW9UqgIIT4xb2fb0xfSUKdmk2Wt82d0x_pVCIS0XU0UcX04Y5Ub549fQErTRgYE6a9tVmZHBPdtx2U3QTmNH0TqacBReNc1wOMXlWW_PzX9yh1MY9ctXTjxfLz1gM4J5j9H7rSZh9l6hPd4mhrl5MHxdPJLZEPO9Xo)** will help us reach our end of quarter goal and put conservative leadership back In Washington.

I have always fought for the values of our country. I hope you will help me continue that fight to defend our way of life and preserve our values in Washington. **What you see on the debate stage tonight cannot be the future of our great country.**

Sincerely,

Wes

[**P.S. Join our ranks by chipping in $50, $25, or $10. Thank you.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=77536386e77342cb895af0f3a6d66792&_e=5hHhBFCMfu0-6ryRaxRkN7_FX5itoVfEKSJfXTm38B7x_8n0dK4hDchAcT7erjwpgocYk8g2AVTJXKwfI40IIHuD8Xu8cWRLmvgkEtjMTXEA6U5tlzoC9tZwalnYki_isc-fWC3aF5F_S4WQ4mO0sl-cAeKjnOXDHdHWIpQUZkLimpsdH-HKx0jF0cjpevGR5heEEkKZ9gQ_R0XBwk9jNSWuC_Z2CDPHLpkFbU2tF2VXSe7aMFvYvbDrmD73dJrXAxcaezcbwlddk4jKD0xgxrOqqGbLOPlQRBn_E_oq7BZxBPBRDpYCJU-bZszDFyTcUMz3nLir9OlYBiiPCeWDWoQzejMncuFmjf031ICnuoyqstirSXooqebxlGB1m-CHZkizsw9kMET6BbJLQC7qDUexA5iFokSxnUXLOUeYGpU1Yydw1298fOOvNFVSo0em)

I’m on a mission to flip TX-07 back to red, but I cannot win without your help. ** The end of the fundraising quarter is rapidly approaching. That is how our campaign will be judged. Your donation of will help us reach our end of quarter goal and put conservative leadership back In Washington. I have always fought for the values of our country. I hope you will help me continue that fight to defend our way of life and preserve our values in Washington. What you see on the debate stage tonight cannot be the future of our great country.** Sincerely, Wes Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
