name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What I’m concerned about in tonight’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
Every ounce of inspiration that has gone into this campaign has come from the people we’ve met along the way. Tonight, my foremost concern is making sure I give their stories and perspectives the time and voice they deserve.
#
This is it. In a handful of hours, I’ll join other candidates on stage in Miami for the very first presidential debate of the cycle.
[At this pivotal moment, I’m counting on each and every one of you. Can you chip in to help us demonstrate momentum heading into the debate?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17968?refcode=ema20190626-38932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=38932%2E444211%2EcosBKs)
There’s a lot riding on tonight, and I hope I’ll make you proud. I want to make sure that tonight, it’s not just me up on that stage. It’s all of us. The people who have come out to our town halls and shared their stories with me. All of you who volunteer for our campaign, knocking doors or hosting debate watch parties. Everyone who’s given a donation no matter how big or small. Tonight, I hope to represent your voice, your ideas, and your strength on stage.
Before the lights go up and we take our place, I am excited to draw inspiration, courage, and wisdom from some of the incredible people we’ve met along the way who will be joining us here in Miami.
First, we’re joined by Marta, one of our incredible volunteers in Miami. Marta was born in Cuba and moved to Puerto Rico, where she became a citizen. She’s a mother of three and a composer of the song, “Now We Are The Citizens.” Marta’s story of coming here to be part of our American community will be on my mind tonight as we discuss how we can remake a broken immigration system in our own image, consistent with our values.
We’re also joined by my good friend Marcel, a 17-year old activist who is organizing against gun violence. We met during our Senate campaign. I know Marcel is going to be counting on all of the candidates tonight to spell out their plans to end gun violence.
Sarah and her husband Barry are here from San Francisco. When my team emailed out a chance to donate to join us at the debates, Sarah was the one who answered the call. As we talk about how broken our campaign finance system is, I’ll be thinking of all of you including Sarah who have stepped up to make this campaign a success by donating online — ALL people, no PACs.
We’re also joined by the Caballero family who I’ve known for such a long time in El Paso. Justin Nelson, who ran for attorney general in Texas. Monica Rodriguez, the first woman elected to serve the Seventh District and the third Latina to serve on the Los Angeles City Council. Gina Hinojosa, who serves in the 49th district in the Texas House. And Marvin Pendarvis, from North Charleston who, at 28 years old, won a seat in the South Carolina House of Representatives.
Every ounce of inspiration that has gone into this campaign has come from the people we’ve met along the way in states across the country. Tonight, my foremost concern is making sure I give their stories and perspectives the time and voice they deserve.
From the beginning, I’ve said that no one candidate or president, no matter how talented or experienced, can meet the challenges we face on their own. The only way is if we do it together.
[So if you have a chance tonight to chip in before we take the stage, please give what you can. Every donation adds up to the greatest grassroots campaign we could possibly build — of, by, and for the people.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17968?refcode=ema20190626-38932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=38932%2E444211%2EcosBKs)
Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17968?refcode=ema20190626-38932&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=38932%2E444211%2EcosBKs)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=38932%2E444211%2EcosBKs). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Tina (personal)
subject: No room to fall short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is urgent.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190626_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") This is urgent, team.

We're only a few days away from our biggest fundraising deadline of the cycle so far, and GOP big money and attack ads have been pouring in against us. With control of the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, I'm getting very nervous.

Right now, I am far short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal -- which means I don't have the resources I need to fight back and defend my seat. **Falling short means big budget cuts at the beginning of July, and that 's why I'm coming to you now:**

**[Will you rush a contribution of $10 to my re-election campaign right now? Our public end-of-quarter deadline is almost here, and with Republican attacks against me and the fate of the Senate at stake, we can't afford to cut back.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190626_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

If the GOP succeeds at turning this seat red, there'll be no chance for Democrats to take back the Senate. That means more judges and anti-choice Supreme Court appointments for Donald Trump, and what could be the deciding vote to strip millions of Americans of their health care.

**We only have one shot to meet this goal -- after our deadline hits, our numbers will be public for everyone to see. If we fall short, the GOP super PACs and dark money donors will know we 're vulnerable, and they'll spend _even more_ against us. **

**[Make an urgent contribution right now before Sunday's huge end-of-quarter deadline. Every dollar you give goes directly toward growing our team, expanding our field operation, and reaching voters across the state.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190626_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Let's do this,
Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190626_em-2-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Will
subject: all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Hi -- did you see Fran's email? Our first publicly reported FEC deadline is Sunday at midnight, and national Republicans and the media are watching closely to see if we have what it takes to win in November. That's why we need your help.

[**Donate before Sunday 's critical FEC deadline to ensure we have what it takes to fund our mission to win in November and get to work for voters, not special interests. We still need $17,414 to reach our goal.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Donate+before+Sundayrsquos+critical+FEC+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2")

**Begin forwarded message:** | Our first publicly reported FEC filing deadline is Sunday at midnight.

**We aren 't taking corporate PAC money, and are 100% reliant on grassroots donations.**

[**Fund our mission with a donation before the first important deadline of our campaign!**](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Fund+our+mission+with+a+donation+before+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2")
---
John Katko votes with Donald Trump and against getting big money out of politics and restoring voting rights. In the military, I learned that most people's behavior can be explained by analyzing what behaviors they are incentivized to do.

Through that lens, it makes sense that Katko regularly votes to betray our best interests. He does the bidding of wealthy, special interest donors and ignores the good people of Central New York.

That's why our urgent mission is to save the middle-class by replacing politicians like Katko who vote against our interests with public servants who will fight every day for working families.

**Another thing I learned in the military is that success requires proper resources, and on midnight this Sunday we face the first public Federal Election Commission filing deadline.** This means that Katko, President Trump, and the national media will be looking at our numbers closely.

They would love to see us fall short.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out to personally ask you to contribute before our FEC filing deadline, Sunday at midnight. We need to raise $21,541 to reach our goal before our numbers become public.**](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+p&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._
**[Donate $10 now!](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Donate+10+now&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190626_2_2")**

Fran

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. clean_body: | | | Hi -- did you see Fran's email? Our first publicly reported FEC deadline is Sunday at midnight, and national Republicans and the media are watching closely to see if we have what it takes to win in November. That's why we need your help. "" Begin forwarded message: | Our first publicly reported FEC filing deadline is Sunday at midnight. We aren 't taking corporate PAC money, and are 100% reliant on grassroots donations. "" John Katko votes with Donald Trump and against getting big money out of politics and restoring voting rights. In the military, I learned that most people's behavior can be explained by analyzing what behaviors they are incentivized to do. Through that lens, it makes sense that Katko regularly votes to betray our best interests. He does the bidding of wealthy, special interest donors and ignores the good people of Central New York. That's why our urgent mission is to save the middle-class by replacing politicians like Katko who vote against our interests with public servants who will fight every day for working families. Another thing I learned in the military is that success requires proper resources, and on midnight this Sunday we face the first public Federal Election Commission filing deadline. This means that Katko, President Trump, and the national media will be looking at our numbers closely. They would love to see us fall short. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page. "" "" "" "" "" Yours in service, Fran |

| | | Today we began airing our newest [TV ad](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=12dcd0b186&e=0bf1d0f47f), and I thought you'd like to see it first. As I mentioned in my ad, my opponent and his insider friends are falsely attacking me relentlessly, spending hundreds of thousands of dollars on negative mail, radio, and TV ads. They know a conservative mom like me will fight for what is right for this district and won't play political games. They know I'm beholden to no one except God and you.

Please help me fight against my opponent's smear campaign by sharing this ad and reminding your friends to vote!
**We are 13 days away from the runoff and early voting has already started. Will you please donate to my campaign today? We need your help!**
[You can donate and share our ad online here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=d221cd49c0&e=0bf1d0f47f) or send a check to the address at the bottom of this email.

Have you made a plan to vote yet? Early voting is underway, and now is the time to encourage your friends to make a plan to vote! You can [find information on how to vote here](https://drjoanperry.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=40b941504fba213abdaddc0bc&id=df472be18f&e=0bf1d0f47f).
Thank you!

subject: No no no, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-062619_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $50,000 FEC deadline goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-062619_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal by June 30, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $10 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-weekly?refcode=EM-062619_3&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Team Beach
subject: Bold Solutions for the Economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Peter, I was proud to serve alongside Governor Deal and see Georgia’s economy flourish. Thanks to the hard work of Governor Kemp, we are fighting every day to continue that growth. Eight years of President Obama’s high-tax, over-regulation, and big government policies stagnated our economy. But here in Georgia we have led the country in delivering a robust economy for our residents. President Trump needs more allies in Washington who understand how our economy works and what our entrepreneurs need in order to grow and thrive. That is why I am running for Congress. [**Pitch in $50 today to give President Trump the reinforcements he needs.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jidiyhll-udyuidthb-y/) Here in Georgia, we passed the largest income tax in state history. We balance our budget each and every year, while investing in critical programs like STEM education and workforce development to make certain our kids meet the demands of 21st Century jobs. That’s how we made Georgia #1 for business. This is exactly the type of bold leadership I will bring to Washington. [**Pledge your support today with a donation of just $50 and help us meet our end of quarter fundraising goal.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jidiyhll-udyuidthb-j/) Thank you for your continued support, Brandon |
